loadQualityProfile.description: Load project quality profile from .planning/context/QUALITY.md or generate default

buildQualityContext.signature: buildQualityContext(cwd: string, setName: string, tokenBudget?: number): string
buildQualityContext.description: Build token-budgeted quality context section for agent prompt injection

checkQualityGates.signature: checkQualityGates(cwd: string, setName: string, artifacts: string[]): { passed: boolean, violations: QualityViolation[] }
checkQualityGates.description: Verify agent output against quality profile patterns and anti-patterns

patternLibrary.description: Curated library of approved patterns referenced during execution

enrichedPrepareSetContext.signature: prepareSetContext(cwd: string, setName: string): EnrichedContext (extends existing with quality + patterns sections)
enrichedPrepareSetContext.description: Enhanced prepareSetContext that includes quality guidelines and pattern references

queryDecisions.signature: queryDecisions(cwd: string, filters?: { category?: string, milestone?: string, limit?: number }): DecisionEntry[]
queryDecisions.description: Query memory decisions to inject relevant past decisions into quality context (soft dependency -- degrades gracefully to empty array if unavailable)

tokenBudgeted.description: buildQualityContext output must not exceed tokenBudget (default: 10000 tokens); total enriched context stays within compaction.cjs DEFAULT_BUDGET_TOKENS

gracefulDegradation.description: If memory-system queryDecisions is unavailable, code-quality operates with empty decision history -- no errors, just reduced context

nonDestructive.description: Quality gates produce warnings and violation reports but never modify agent output or block execution
